_**User**_

remove:

Battery life I never have to think about
I don’t want a charging ritual. I don’t want to remember to put earphones back in a case every time I’m done. I don’t want a “low battery” beep in the middle of a call.

My bar is roughly 10+ hours on a charge. That means I charge them maybe twice a week, usually while I shower or cook dinner, and then forget about it.

The frame I now use when looking at any wireless audio: how often will I be forced to think about the battery? If the answer is “every day,” it’s already losing.
